Spreadsheet Cleanup & Data Organization

Your spreadsheet should be a tool,
not a source of stress.

I help Portland small businesses clean up messy Excel and Google Sheets files with fast turnaround and flat rates.

Get in touch

What I do

Straightforward help with spreadsheets that have gotten out of hand

If you're running a small business with spreadsheets that have gotten out of hand: messy formatting, broken formulas, data scattered across tabs. I can fix that. I clean up and organize Excel and Google Sheets files for local Portland businesses, with fast turnaround and a flat rate. Most jobs are done within 48 hours for $50 to $150 depending on the scope of the project.

I work with inventory lists, invoice logs, scheduling sheets, expense trackers, and anything else that's grown too complicated to manage comfortably. No tech jargon, no surprise charges , just a file you can actually use.

Services & pricing

Flat rates, no surprises

Basic Cleanup

$50 flat

Formatting fixes, consistent capitalization, duplicate removal, basic sorting. Up to 200 rows. Delivered within 24 hours.

Full Reorganization

$75–$100 flat

Everything in Basic, plus formula fixes, merged duplicates, added totals or summaries, and a clean layout you can hand to anyone.

Template Build

$100–$150 flat

A reusable sheet built to your workflow: invoice tracker, inventory log, or expense sheet. Fill it in each month and it does the math for you.

Not sure?

Free estimate

Send me your file and describe the problem. I'll tell you what it needs and what it'll cost before any work starts.
